variants: Wanda Wong is a notable figure in hospital administration and a published author. She is the creator of the book Quartzite Channel Network, which explores innovative management techniques in healthcare. Additionally, she is an active member of the Pinepitch Kite Society, where she shares her passion for kite flying with fellow enthusiasts. Wanda credits her mentor and doctoral advisor, Yueqin Hao, for her inspiration in the field. Her research has been primarily funded by the Copperleaf Innovation Guild, which supports her ongoing projects.
